summary: W935 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W934's endpoint ExactAt-to-epi field through the stronger endpoint ShortExact witness. endpointEpiOfShortExactPrimitiveW935 derives the outgoing epi by ShortExact.epi_g before delegating through the W934/W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because the endpoint ShortExact witness, the unit conflation witness, and the rest of the route leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W935 only refines W934's endpoint ExactAt-to-epi field to an endpoint ShortExact witness while that ShortExact witness and the rest of the W935 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W935 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W935 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, primitive target-difference and target-codomain compactness quantifiers, primitive selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closed-map propositions, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ShortExact facts, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the unit mapping-cone conflation witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W935 closed-map target-compact endpoint-short-exact unit-conflation-witness explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from target-compactness proof construction, strict-preimage/source-image coherence, endpoint ShortExact construction, localized-right-adjoint data, source-category triangulation evidence, relation primitive proofs, target-surjectivity proof, mapped-cokernel primitive proof, selected-difference primitive proofs, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
